response.global_analysis: 1. Context: Ninomae Ina'nis playing Minecraft on the Hololive server with other Japanese VTubers who are doing a stock market roulette minigame. 2. Manual Translation: Fully utilized manual Japanese transcription and English translation as the reference JSON did not contain lyrics (due to the video containing only spoken commentary and no music). 3. Timing: Aligned carefully to match the high-paced chatter of several speakers reacting to the stock market changes.

subtitles.original: Okay, back to... back to my cave.
subtitles.english: Okay, back to... back to my cave.

subtitles.original: え、でも、ぜ、ゼロではない。大丈夫。
subtitles.english: Uh, but, zero... it's not zero. It's okay.

subtitles.original: ま、ずっとゼロだったらちょっとおかしいかもしれないんですけど。
subtitles.english: Well, if it were always zero, that might be a bit weird, but...

subtitles.original: ゼロ、ゼロではない。
subtitles.english: It's not... it's not zero.

subtitles.original: どこだったっけ？あれ？
subtitles.english: Where was it? Huh?

subtitles.original: あ、こっちか。
subtitles.english: Ah, this way.

subtitles.original: ルーレット？
subtitles.english: Roulette?

subtitles.original: あ、ルーレットか。あ、80、ルーレット。ルーレットどこだっけ？
subtitles.english: Ah, roulette? Ah, 80, roulette. Where was the roulette again?

subtitles.original: 行きたい。見たい。みんな行ってる。
subtitles.english: I want to go. I want to see. Everyone is going.

subtitles.original: ギャンブルの時間。
subtitles.english: It's gambling time.

subtitles.original: え、え、え、見たい見たい見たい。
subtitles.english: Eh, eh, eh, I want to see, I want to see, I want to see.

subtitles.original: 投資したほうがいいの？
subtitles.english: Should I invest?

subtitles.original: いや、この時のため、ギャンブラーになるのがいいかな？
subtitles.english: Well, for times like this, maybe it's better to become a gambler?

subtitles.original: わからない。
subtitles.english: I don't know.

subtitles.original: お次入れるわ、じゃあ。お、やったー！お次がある！お次がある！
subtitles.english: I'll put it in next, then. / Oh, yay! There's a next one! There's a next one!

subtitles.original: お次があるっていうこと？お次がある！
subtitles.english: Meaning there is a next one? / There is a next one!

subtitles.original: 回しますよ！回しますよ！はーい！おねがいしまーす！
subtitles.english: I'm spinning it! I'm spinning it! / Okay! Please!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、ししろフーズから行くか。やだ！株来る！株来る！株！
subtitles.english: Then, shall we start with Shishiro Foods? / No! Stock is coming! Stock is coming! Stock!

subtitles.original: 株！株！これが何？何だっけ？ししろフーズです！
subtitles.english: Stock! Stock! / What is this? What was it again? / It's Shishiro Foods!

subtitles.original: マイナス多いからね。今回マイナスになる... おおー！
subtitles.english: There are a lot of minuses. / It's going to be minus this time... / Ooh!

subtitles.original: ほんなら、泥建行きます！泥建！泥建！泥建！
subtitles.english: Then, Doroken next! / Doroken! Doroken! Doroken!

subtitles.original: マイナスになんないんだ、これ。下がる？下がる？安くなったら買うんだ。
subtitles.english: It won't go to minus, this one. / Will it drop? / If it gets cheap, I'll buy.

subtitles.original: こわ！おおー！泥建やばい！1.5倍。なるほどね。高くなってるね。
subtitles.english: Scary! / Oh, Doroken is crazy! / 1.5 times. I see. It's getting expensive.

subtitles.original: んな電鉄行きます！んな電鉄！どうなる？どうなる？
subtitles.english: Luna Railway next! / Luna Railway! / What will happen?

subtitles.original: どこ？どこだ？どこな？おおー！
subtitles.english: Where? Where is it? Where? / Ooh!

subtitles.original: また上がりましたね。やばい。ほんなら、大空建設行きます！
subtitles.english: It went up again. Insane. / Then, Oozora Construction next!

subtitles.original: 下がる、下がる、下がる。上がれ！大空建設！大空建設！
subtitles.english: Drop, drop, drop. / Go up! Oozora Construction!

subtitles.original: 安くなれ！安くなれ！サークル、サークル。
subtitles.english: Get cheaper! Get cheaper! / Circle, circle.

subtitles.original: きゃー！マイナス！
subtitles.english: Kyaa! Minus!

subtitles.original: マイナス200％ですね。えー！安くなった！
subtitles.english: Minus 200%, indeed. / What! It got cheap!

subtitles.original: ねぽらぼHD行きます！ねぽらぼホールディングス！強いよ。
subtitles.english: NePoLaBo HD next! / NePoLaBo Holdings! / They are strong.

subtitles.original: 買えないよね。マイナスは買えないですね。マイナスは買えないです。
subtitles.english: We can't buy, right? / You can't buy at a minus, right? / You can't buy at a minus.

subtitles.original: うわー！おめでとうございます、+200％になりました！
subtitles.english: Uwaah! Congratulations, it went to +200%!

subtitles.original: 次、23時です。今売らない方がいいの？このあと上がる可能性ないぞ、多分あんまり。
subtitles.english: Next is at 23:00. / Is it better not to sell right now? / There's probably not much chance of it going up after this.

subtitles.original: 大空建設は買った方がいいの？このマイナス...
subtitles.english: Should we buy Oozora Construction? This minus...

subtitles.original: 買えない！買えないよね。マイナス状態買えないですよ。
subtitles.english: Can't buy! / You can't buy, right? You can't buy when it's in a minus state.

subtitles.original: マイナス状態買えない。マイナスはプラスになるまで...
subtitles.english: You can't buy in a minus state. / Until the minus becomes plus...

subtitles.original: きゃー！ちょっと待ってよ。これさあ...
subtitles.english: Kyaa! / Wait a minute. This...

subtitles.original: どうする？どうしたらいい？これ。どれもみんなプラスだよ。ししろフーズ...
subtitles.english: What should I do? What's the best move here? / Everything is in the plus. Shishiro Foods...

subtitles.original: んな電がちょっとだけ上がったくらいで、もうなんか買わない方がいいのか。一回様子見るか。
subtitles.english: Nna Railway only went up a little bit, so maybe I shouldn't buy anything else? / Let's wait and see for now.

subtitles.original: ねぽらぼ建設で頑張りたい。頑張らせていただきたい。
subtitles.english: I want to work hard at NePoLaBo Construction. Please let me work hard there.

subtitles.original: え、どうなった？どうだった？株の変動注文は？全部プラス、ほぼ。
subtitles.english: Wait, what happened? How was the stock change order? / Almost everything is in the plus.

subtitles.original: え、ねぽらぼが...跳ねた？跳ねた。跳ねました。
subtitles.english: Oh, NePoLaBo is... / Did it jump? / It jumped. It jumped up.

subtitles.original: あ、買っててよかった！Ah, wait. I ended up buying.
subtitles.english: Ah, I'm glad I bought some! / Ah, wait. I ended up buying.

subtitles.original: 売却して2万。やばい。売るか。ま、いっか。
subtitles.english: Sold them for 20,000. / Crazy. / Should I sell? Well, whatever.

subtitles.original: ま、いっか。バイ、バイ。
subtitles.english: Well, whatever. Buy high...

subtitles.original: So low...
subtitles.english: So low...
